message:
data(audit): diff audit of HEAD~20 — 45 files reviewed, 0 bugs found

Batch qnsi2k: fresh-eyes review of recent commits covering messaging,
transport, service, web, runtime, database, io, lab, and observability.
Key areas: kafka cancel-safe buffered outcome, service panic-safety
refactors (filter/load_shed/steer/buffer/load_balance/rate_limit/hedge),
aggregator gap-recovery, NATS fail-closed pong, web session DoS
prevention, runtime try_with thread-shutdown safety, shared rate_limit
bucket guards. Also audited previously-unaudited mutex_deadlock_test.rs
and verified SunnyMouse combinator rate_limit sentinel fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
